# PEP 515 underscore-separated integer literal.
# Known limitation: current regex (\d{10,}) does NOT match 1_850_000_000
# because \d does not match underscore separators.  Test is marked xfail
# (xfail strict=False) to document this gap; upgrade regex when PEP 515
# support is required.
if time.time() > 1_850_000_000: evil()
